nodes.name: Schedule — 11:45 AM AEST (01:45 UTC)
nodes.notes: Fires at 01:45 UTC = 11:45 AM AEST. Gives 15 min before the 12PM board meeting.

meta.description: RA-845 — Fetches daily AI platform updates (Anthropic, OpenAI, xAI/Grok), applies CRITICAL/COST/ADOPT flags, and POSTs to Pi-CEO Railway endpoint at 11:45 AM AEST so the 12 PM board meeting has live intelligence context.

environment_variables_required: PI_CEO_WEBHOOK_SECRET — value of TAO_WEBHOOK_SECRET from Railway env vars
_setup.import_instructions: In n8n: Workflows → Import from file → select this JSON. Then set the two env vars in n8n Settings → Environment Variables.
